title: You can grab a four-pack of Govee’s color-changing smart bulbs for just $27
summary: You can add multiple bulbs to a single room to create cooler, more colorful effects. | Image: Govee Spring cleaning isn’t just about clearing things out. title: Nothing Phone (4a) review
Samsung's new app temporarily cures motion sickness through earbuds
summary: Samsung has launched a new Android app that can work with its Galaxy Buds4 Pro to temporarily rid you of motion sickness. The idea comes from a Japanese study performed at the University of Nagoya, where researchers found that listening to a 100Hz sine wave at 75-85dB for several minutes can tempor…
